name: hotpotqa_ref
source_note: Locally vendored reference dataset in the HotpotQA multi-hop format. Network-free: NOT a live download of the official HotpotQA suite and NOT official leaderboard scores. Tasks test DESi's deterministic hop-graph structuring and gap detection, not LLM accuracy.

tasks.question: are entities A and B of the same type?
which award did the actor of role R win?

hops.fact: role R played by actor Ac

tasks.question: what river runs through the city hosting event E?

hops.fact: event E hosted by city Ci
